allow: Bash(python3 -c "import secrets; print\('SECRET_KEY=' + secrets.token_hex\(32\)\); print\('JWT_SECRET_KEY=' + secrets.token_hex\(32\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Boxes cargadas: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\('  -', b['name'], '$'+str\(b['price']\)\) for b in d]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Token OK:', bool\(d.get\('token'\)\)\); print\('User:', d.get\('user',{}\).get\('username'\)\); print\('Wallet:', d.get\('wallet',{}\).get\('balance'\)\)")
